/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/broker.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/broker.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/broker.dir/src/message.cpp.o CMakeFiles/broker.dir/src/router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/broker.dir/src/zmq_session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/broker.dir/src/storage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/broker.dir/src/dispatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/broker.dir/src/offline_queue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/broker.dir/src/correlation_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/broker.dir/src/metrics.cpp.o -o broker  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libzmq.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so _deps/spdlog-build/libspdlogd.a
